The operator

Operations is the craft.
Data is the compass.

A snapshot of who you're actually emailing — built like one of my dashboards: the essentials, at a glance.

Bio — the short version

From supply-chain classrooms in Bengaluru to running creator pipelines for fast-moving B2B brands — I've learned great operations is invisible when it works.

I sit at the intersection of people and process: recruiting niche experts (think cybersecurity writers who actually get zero-trust), negotiating rates, designing onboarding flows, and reporting it all in formats leadership actually reads.

The throughline is decisions made with data — and I'm doubling down on it, moving deliberately toward business & data analyst work.

Binayak — after hours
Win / Watch / Pipeline — the EOD format I run daily
WIN

Full SME-reviewer bench onboarded for a cybersecurity launch — brief to live in under two weeks.

WATCH

Rate negotiations open on two niche writer requisitions.

PIPELINE

A dozen vetted creators moving through screening for next quarter's ramps.

Local time --:--:--

Mumbai, IST — shifted late by design, so US mornings and Indian evenings share a desk.

The track record

One pipeline, read top to bottom.

The line fills as you scroll — the same way good supply work compounds: stage by stage, nothing skipped.

Nov 2024 — Present

Creative Supply Acquisition & Operations Consultant (US)

Pepper Content · Full-time · Mumbai — enterprise B2B content marketplace

  • Source, onboard and manage a pool of freelance writers, editors, designers and video editors for US & global enterprise clients across BFSI, SaaS, AI-native and HRTech — single supply POC across six active domains.
  • Design and run structured onboarding workflows, group briefing sessions and quality workshops — cutting creator ramp time and lifting first-submission quality across cohorts.
  • Build and maintain sheets and dashboards tracking creator performance, delivery rates and quality metrics — presenting insights directly to enterprise clients to shape content-strategy decisions.
  • Partner cross-functionally with Sales, Delivery and Marketing to align creator output with client briefs, SEO requirements and brand-voice standards.
  • Resolve escalations, run feedback loops and drive creator retention across multi-client accounts — consistent quality under tight turnaround windows.
Mar 2024 — Apr 2024

Operations Intern

Global Quest Technologies · Bengaluru

  • Maintained data-entry records and tracking sheets for recruitment and operational pipelines — accuracy, follow-up and documentation as daily habit.
  • Designed and delivered a structured training session for incoming interns, simplifying complex operational processes for a group audience.
  • Hands-on exposure to finance and operations workflows inside a lean start-up environment.
Nov 2023 — Mar 2024

Student Placement Coordinator

MS Ramaiah College of Arts, Science & Commerce · Bengaluru

  • Connected corporate HR teams to campus — email invitations, cold calls and persistent follow-ups to bring placement drives in.
  • First real reps in pipeline thinking: outreach, tracking, conversion — before it had a job title.
Foundation

BBA, Supply Chain & Logistics Management

MS Ramaiah College, Bengaluru

  • Where the systems thinking started — flow, constraints, clean handoffs.
  • Parallel life: national-level playback singing and state-level football. Discipline transfers.
